ddls:
CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the location */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the location */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the location */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region of the location */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the location */,
  "tax_rate" TEXT /* Local tax rate for the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "expense_rates" (
  "rate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each expense rate */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location where the expense rate applies */,
  "meal_rate_breakfast" TEXT /* Meal rate for breakfast */,
  "meal_rate_lunch" TEXT /* Meal rate for lunch */,
  "meal_rate_dinner" TEXT /* Meal rate for dinner */,
  "meal_rate_total" TEXT /* Total meal rate */,
  "incidental_amount" TEXT /* Incidental amount */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date from which the rates are applicable */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date the rate was last modified */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the rate */,
  "modified_by" INTEGER /* User who last modified the rate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_expense_rates_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "currencies" (
  "currency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each currency */,
  "currency_code" TEXT /* Code of the currency (e.g., USD, AUD) */,
  "currency_name" TEXT /* Name of the currency */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the currency */,
  "decimal_places" INTEGER /* Number of decimal places for the currency */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("currency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exchange_rates" (
  "exchange_rate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exchange rate */,
  "from_currency_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the from currency */,
  "to_currency_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the to currency */,
  "exchange_rate" TEXT /* Exchange rate */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Effective date of the exchange rate */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date the exchange rate was last modified */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the exchange rate */,
  "modified_by" INTEGER /* User who last modified the exchange rate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exchange_rate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employees" (
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employee */,
  "employee_name" TEXT /* Full name of the employee */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the employee */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the employee (e.g., employee, manager, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the employee */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the manager of the employee */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date the employee record was last modified */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the employee record */,
  "modified_by" INTEGER /* User who last modified the employee record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "expenses" (
  "expense_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each expense */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the employee incurring the expense */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location where the expense was incurred */,
  "expense_date" TEXT /* Date the expense was incurred */,
  "expense_type" TEXT /* Type of expense (e.g., meal, transportation) */,
  "expense_amount" TEXT /* Amount of the expense */,
  "currency_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the currency of the expense */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the expense (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  "approved_amount" TEXT /* Amount of the expense after approval (if different from the original amount) */,
  "currency_exchange_rate" TEXT /* Exchange rate used for converting the expense amount to the base currency */,
  "base_currency_amount" TEXT /* Expense amount in the base currency */,
  "tax_amount" TEXT /* Tax amount for the expense */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date the expense record was last modified */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the expense record */,
  "modified_by" INTEGER /* User who last modified the expense record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("expense_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_expenses_currency_id FOREIGN KEY ("currency_id") REFERENCES currencies ("currency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_expenses_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_expenses_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "expense_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each expense report */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the employee submitting the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was submitted */,
  "total_expenses" TEXT /* Total expenses in the report */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., submitted, approved, rejected) */,
  "base_currency_total" TEXT /* Total expenses in the base currency */,
  "tax_total" TEXT /* Total tax amount for the report */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date the report was last modified */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the report */,
  "modified_by" INTEGER /* User who last modified the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_expense_reports_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_lines" (
  "line_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report line */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the expense report */,
  "expense_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the expense */,
  "expense_date" TEXT /* Date the expense was incurred */,
  "expense_amount" TEXT /* Amount of the expense */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report line (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  "approved_amount" TEXT /* Amount of the expense after approval (if different from the original amount) */,
  "currency_exchange_rate" TEXT /* Exchange rate used for converting the expense amount to the base currency */,
  "base_currency_amount" TEXT /* Expense amount in the base currency */,
  "tax_amount" TEXT /* Tax amount for the expense */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date the report line was last modified */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the report line */,
  "modified_by" INTEGER /* User who last modified the report line */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("line_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_lines_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES expense_reports ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_lines_expense_id FOREIGN KEY ("expense_id") REFERENCES expenses ("expense_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "approvals" (
  "approval_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each approval */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the expense report */,
  "approver_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the approver */,
  "approval_date" TEXT /* Date the report was approved */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the approval (e.g., approved, rejected) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments or notes by the approver */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date the approval was last modified */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the approval */,
  "modified_by" INTEGER /* User who last modified the approval */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("approval_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_approvals_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES expense_reports ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_approvals_approver_id FOREIGN KEY ("approver_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "approval_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history entry */,
  "approval_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the approval */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date the action was taken */,
  "action_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user taking the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action (e.g., approve, reject) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments or notes by the user taking the action */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date the history entry was last modified */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the history entry */,
  "modified_by" INTEGER /* User who last modified the history entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_approval_history_action_by FOREIGN KEY ("action_by") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_approval_history_approval_id FOREIGN KEY ("approval_id") REFERENCES approvals ("approval_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "approval_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the approval */,
  "recipient_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the recipient */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date the notification was sent */,
  "subject" TEXT /* Subject of the notification */,
  "body" TEXT /* Body of the notification */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the notification (e.g., sent, failed) */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date the notification was last modified */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the notification */,
  "modified_by" INTEGER /* User who last modified the notification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_approval_id FOREIGN KEY ("approval_id") REFERENCES approvals ("approval_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_recipient_id FOREIGN KEY ("recipient_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)
